title: Egyptian Cottage Pilaf Bowl
description: A flavorful and nutritious gluten-free bowl made with Egyptian-style pilaf, crunchy vegetables, and a tangy cottage cheese topping.
instructions: Cook the Egyptian Pilaf according to package instructions.
Chop the carrots and bell peppers into bite-sized pieces.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped vegetables and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the gluten-free seasonings and lemon juice.
Transfer the cooked pilaf to a bowl and top with the cooked vegetables.
Crumble the cottage cheese on top of the pilaf.
